title: Taco Bell Cravings Value Menu nutrition table
html:
Fourth Taco Bell page in the 4:56 a.m. burst (extends past the parallel-slice's 4:56:30 capture by 14 seconds). The Cravings Value Menu rows: 3-Cheese Chicken Flatbread Melt, Cheesy Bean & Rice Burrito, Cheesy Double Beef Burrito, Cheesy Fiesta Potatoes, Cheesy Roll Up, Chicken Enchilada Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, Loaded Beef Nachos, Spicy Potato Soft Taco — with macros.
